code: import React from'react';import{Link,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{Home,Search,ShoppingCart,User,Heart}from'lucide-react';import{useSelector}from'react-redux';import{useCart}from'../../hooks/usecart';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const MobileBottomNav=()=>{const location=useLocation();const _useCart=useCart(),getItemCount=_useCart.getItemCount;const _useSelector=useSelector(state=>state.auth),isAuthenticated=_useSelector.isAuthenticated;const navItems=[{icon:Home,label:'Home',path:'/'},{icon:Search,label:'Search',path:'/search'},{icon:Heart,label:'Wishlist',path:'/wishlist'},{icon:ShoppingCart,label:'Cart',path:'/cart',badge:getItemCount()},{icon:User,label:'Account',path:isAuthenticated?'/account':'/login'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 z-40 md:hidden safe-area-pb",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex justify-around items-center h-14",children:navItems.map(item=>{const isActive=location.pathname===item.path;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:item.path,className:"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full relative",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"relative",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(item.icon,{className:"w-5 h-5 ".concat(isActive?'text-primary-700':'text-gray-500'),strokeWidth:isActive?2.5:2}),item.badge>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"absolute -top-2 -right-2 bg-brand-red text-white text-[10px] font-bold w-4 h-4 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center",children:item.badge})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"text-[10px] mt-0.5 ".concat(isActive?'text-primary-700 font-medium':'text-gray-500'),children:item.label})]},item.path);})})});};export default MobileBottomNav;
